text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While having lunch in the cafeteria, I catch Agnes
Digital snooping around the place.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Is that enough for you, Suzuka? I can get you
some more if you want!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, this is enough. Um... how's your
weight-watching going, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Quit copying me! I picked that dessert first!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well, you took the side dish that I wanted! It was me who—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Inspirations... Rivals... Guehehe, just look at them
all eating lunch together!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aaasfhjsksd, they're too blinding! But I've gotta
burn this into my retinas! Lights... action... stare
respectfully!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Fascinating how visual excitement can invoke
such heavy breathing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uwahskgl?! T-Tachyon! As indubitably intelligent
as ever today, I see!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
An interesting greeting considering we're
roommates and saw each other this morning, but
no matter.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, there's something that's been
on my mind for the longest time. Care to indulge
me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I'll tell you anything and everything! W-well,
I mean, depending what you're okay hearing...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was curious about the shrine you have in our
room, you see. What exactly are you
worshipping?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wha? M-my merch shrine? That's, uh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
May my precious Umas have a wonderful day and
week and month and be happy forever and ever
and ever!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Asdfkl, I'm so blessed! My figures look extra ultra
radiant today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume figures... I see. You certainly could
liken figures to idols.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
See, whenever I pray to them, I feel like I can
take on any track there is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like... my Uma oshis are working so hard, I feel
like I can do my best too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It gets my blood pumping and my heart pounding.
I feel all-powered up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh? That's very intriguing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like more than just an adrenaline rush.
Perhaps your heart palpitations have an effect on
your blood circulation... Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Say, Digital. How would you feel about working
with me as my test subject?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwargh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha! An excellent response!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now let's see... I'll first require a small sample in
order to analyze you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Give me your hand. Now relaaax, you'll barely
feel a prick!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
N-no! I can't touch an Umamusume! That's against
fangirl code!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A-ahem! No touching, no requests, and absolutely no getting in the way! But... But... AAAAAAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Digital, please compose yourself. I need a control
sample of your vitals in a relaxed sta—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Just, just imagining touching the Agnes Tachyon... I can't. Digitan's poor little heart can't hold all these feels!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah, I'm gonna cry tears of joy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! Such explosive force! Maybe she has
experienced some kind of mutation after all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Mwahaha... This is getting very interesting!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Stop right there, Digital!
